# Transcrição: 4. AFFORDABILITY CLOSE - I WILL BE THE FIRST TO SAY

- **Fonte:** 4. AFFORDABILITY CLOSE - I WILL BE THE FIRST TO SAY
- **Duração:** 00:15
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 00:15]

You just heard, I don't think I can afford to do this. Look, if I can't come up with some figures that make this affordable, easily affordable for you and your household, I would be the first to suggest you not purchase it. Fair enough?
